goal: Test coverage in this repository is uneven. As the Solution Architect, have the team identify the most critical under-tested code path (the one whose failure would do the most damage), and add meaningful, real test coverage for it — tests that would actually catch regressions, not trivial assertions.
acceptance_hint: Real tests for a genuinely critical path, that pass and would catch regressions. Judge: are the tests meaningful (cover edge cases / failure modes) or box-ticking?
notes: Test-coverage seed — exercises the test work type (§2.1 balance) directly.
